prs.title: feat: externalize HubSpot onboarding into public API + rival-first onboarding
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Externalizing HubSpot onboarding into a public API with rival-first onboarding flow touches 76 files including schema migrations, AI orchestration, multiple API routes, and extensive documentation — a major feature addition with architectural implications.

prs.title: Release: CRM/ACE parity, guided experience tasks, and CI/CD migration pipeline
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 162 files changed with 10,401 custom lines spanning Salesforce CRM integration, ACE parity, guided experience tasks, CI/CD pipeline migration, schema changes, and comprehensive documentation represents a transformative multi-week release.

prs.title: Address Copilot review comments on release PR #442
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 32 lines across 4 files addressing Copilot review comments — minor schema, migration, and field definition fixups with no novel logic.

prs.title: Log missing Salesforce OAuth credentials
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 8 lines adding a missing credentials log statement to the Salesforce OAuth route — a trivial single-concern fix.

prs.title: SM-551: introduces "next task" functions for guided experience
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 1,405 lines introducing next-task logic for the guided experience, including schema changes, multiple server actions, a fetch-tree utility, a sandbox debug UI, and three unit test files — a significant self-contained feature.

prs.title: Fix staging deploy: skip secret keys that collide with container env vars
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 16 lines in a single CI shell script adding a targeted skip condition to prevent secret key collisions — a small but meaningful bug fix.

prs.title: CI/CD: run DB migrations on deploy + auto-sync env vars from Secrets Manager
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 254 lines across 5 files wiring DB migration execution into the deploy lifecycle and automating env-var sync from Secrets Manager — a solid DevOps feature requiring coordination across Dockerfile, entrypoint, workflows, and a new CI script.

prs.title: fix(prisma): disambiguate duplicate 20260608000000 migration timestamp
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Zero net custom lines — purely a migration file rename to resolve a timestamp collision, with no logic changes.

prs.title: Salesforce CRM parity + CRM↔ACE crosswalk, 3-way drift reconciliation, and deal-value split
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 8,423 custom lines across 83 files delivering full Salesforce CRM parity, a CRM↔ACE crosswalk, three-way drift reconciliation, deal-value splitting, multiple schema migrations, AI enrichment modules, and extensive documentation — an epic, multi-week architectural feature.

stories.name: Salesforce CRM Parity & ACE Integration
stories.rationale: Delivered full Salesforce CRM feature parity with ACE crosswalk and drift reconciliation, plus improved error visibility for OAuth credential issues.

stories.name: HubSpot Public API & Rival-First Onboarding
stories.rationale: Externalized HubSpot onboarding into a public API and introduced a rival-first onboarding flow to streamline partner and customer activation.

stories.name: Guided Experience & CRM/ACE Release
stories.rationale: Shipped the major CRM/ACE parity release including guided experience next-task logic, with follow-up Copilot review fixes bundled in.

stories.name: Automated Deployment Pipeline & Environment Management
stories.rationale: Automated database migrations on deploy, synced environment variables from Secrets Manager, and fixed a staging deploy conflict with container env vars.

stories.name: Database Migration Integrity Fix
stories.rationale: Resolved a duplicate Prisma migration timestamp to restore schema migration integrity.
